<!--
Thanks for opening a PR. A few quick checks before you hit "Create":

1. Does `npm run lint` pass locally?
2. If you added a page: did you also add it to `manifest.json`?
3. If you removed or renamed a page: did you check for inbound links
   from other pages?

The CI on this PR will validate frontmatter, markdownlint, placeholder
names, and external link reachability. Feel free to leave the
description below as-is if it's a small fix.
-->
